description: Map comparison config for the selected VIS320 and GAD diffusion-only runs (n=3 per tracer), using analysis-config paths to resolve each sample's output folder and the finalized local effective diffusivity map display settings.
notes: Each sample points to its Data_Analysis config instead of duplicating the output folder, ROI folder, and dx_mm.
Local effective diffusion maps use the finalized display settings: target profiles at 5, 10, and 20 min; fixed color limits; and reliable-depth trimming for the local D map only.
The linked diffusion analysis configs use local effective diffusion map temporal smoothing with a 15-point sliding window.
ROI folder and depth spacing are inferred from run_metadata.json when available.
Target times are set within the overlapping usable window across the six chosen runs.
